last_perfect_solution:
```tscircuit
circuit "Arduino Nano v3.0" {
    # Fabrication Notes:
    # - All resistors and non-electrolytic capacitors are assumed to be SMD-0603 unless specified.
    # - Electrolytic capacitors are assumed to be SMD-0805 or larger based on value.
    # - Headers are 2.54mm pitch through-hole.
    # - USB connector is SMD.
    # - Regulators are SOT-223.
    # - ATmega328P is TQFP-32.
    # - CH340G is SSOP-20.

    #region Power Supply
    component usb_conn type "USB_MINI_B" {
        footprint "USB-MINI-B-SMD"
        pin "VBUS" 1
        pin "D-" 2
        pin "D+" 3
        pin "ID" 4 # Typically NC or tied to GND on Mini-B
        pin "GND" 5
    }

    # USB VBUS protection diode (e.g., Schottky diode)
    component d1 type "Diode" {
        value "SS14" # 1A, 40V Schottky
        footprint "SMA"
        pin "A" 1
        pin "K" 2
    }

    # Main 5V Linear Regulator (AMS1117-5.0)
    component reg5v type "LDO" {
        value "AMS1117-5.0"
        footprint "SOT-223"
        pin "GND" 1
        pin "VOUT" 2
        pin "VIN" 3
    }

    # Optional 3.3V Linear Regulator (AMS1117-3.3) - requested by user, not always standard on Nano
    # This provides a separate 3.3V rail from VIN, distinct from the CH340G's V3 output.
    component reg3v3 type "LDO" {
        value "AMS1117-3.3"
        footprint "SOT-223"
        pin "GND" 1
        pin "VOUT" 2
        pin "VIN" 3
    }

    # Power Supply Capacitors
    component c_usb_in type "Capacitor" { value "10uF" footprint "SMD-0805" } # VBUS filtering
    component c_vin_reg_in type "Capacitor" { value "10uF" footprint "SMD-0805" } # VIN_REG filtering
    component c_5v_out type "Capacitor" { value "10uF" footprint "SMD-0805" } # 5V regulator output filtering
    component c_5v_dec type "Capacitor" { value "0.1uF" footprint "SMD-0603" } # 5V rail decoupling
    component c_3v3_reg_in type "Capacitor" { value "10uF" footprint "SMD-0805" } # 3.3V regulator input filtering
    component c_3v3_reg_out type "Capacitor" { value "10uF" footprint "SMD-0805" } # 3.3V regulator output filtering
    component c_3v3_reg_dec type "Capacitor" { value "0.1uF" footprint "SMD-0603" } # 3.3V rail decoupling

    # Power Indicator LED
    component r_pwr_led type "Resistor" { value "1k" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component pwr_led type "LED" { value "Green" footprint "SMD-0603" }

    # Power Nets
    net "VBUS_USB" { usb_conn.VBUS }
    net "GND" {
        usb_conn.GND, d1.A, reg5v.GND, reg3v3.GND,
        c_usb_in.2, c_vin_reg_in.2, c_5v_out.2, c_5v_dec.2,
        c_3v3_reg_in.2, c_3v3_reg_out.2, c_3v3_reg_dec.2,
        pwr_led.2
    }
    net "VIN_REG" { d1.K, reg5v.VIN, c_vin_reg_in.1, reg3v3.VIN, c_3v3_reg_in.1 } # Input to 5V and 3.3V regulators
    net "VCC_5V" { reg5v.VOUT, c_5v_out.1, c_5v_dec.1, r_pwr_led.1 } # Main 5V rail
    net "VCC_3V3_REG" { reg3v3.VOUT, c_3v3_reg_out.1, c_3v3_reg_dec.1 } # 3.3V rail from AMS1117-3.3

    # Power Connections
    connect VBUS_USB to d1.A
    connect VCC_5V to pwr_led.1 via r_pwr_led.2
    connect usb_conn.ID to GND # Tie ID to GND for Mini-B

    #endregion

    #region ATmega328P Microcontroller
    component atmega328p type "MCU" {
        value "ATmega328P-AU" # TQFP-32 package for SMD Nano
        footprint "TQFP-32"
        # Power
        pin "VCC" 4, 6, 17, 18 # VCC and AVCC
        pin "GND" 3, 5, 19, 20
        pin "AREF" 21
        # Crystal
        pin "XTAL1" 9
        pin "XTAL2" 10
        # Reset
        pin "RESET" 1
        # Digital I/O
        pin "PD0/RXD" 2
        pin "PD1/TXD" 32
        pin "PD2" 31
        pin "PD3" 30
        pin "PD4" 29
        pin "PD5" 28
        pin "PD6" 27
        pin "PD7" 26
        pin "PB0/D8" 14
        pin "PB1/D9" 15
        pin "PB2/D10" 16
        pin "PB3/MOSI/D11" 17
        pin "PB4/MISO/D12" 18
        pin "PB5/SCK/D13" 19
        # Analog I/O
        pin "PC0/ADC0" 23
        pin "PC1/ADC1" 24
        pin "PC2/ADC2" 25
        pin "PC3/ADC3" 26
        pin "PC4/SDA/ADC4" 27
        pin "PC5/SCL/ADC5" 28
        pin "PC6/ADC6" 29 # A6 on Nano
        pin "PC7/ADC7" 30 # A7 on Nano
    }

    # ATmega328P Crystal (16MHz)
    component xtal_mcu type "Crystal" {
        value "16MHz"
        footprint "SMD-3225" # Common SMD crystal size
        pin "1" 1
        pin "2" 2
    }
    component c_xtal_mcu1 type "Capacitor" { value "22pF" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component c_xtal_mcu2 type "Capacitor" { value "22pF" footprint "SMD-0603" }

    # ATmega328P Decoupling Capacitors
    component c_mcu_dec1 type "Capacitor" { value "0.1uF" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component c_mcu_dec2 type "Capacitor" { value "0.1uF" footprint "SMD-0603" }

    # ATmega328P Reset Circuit
    component r_reset_pullup type "Resistor" { value "10k" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component c_reset_dtr type "Capacitor" { value "0.1uF" footprint "SMD-0603" } # For DTR auto-reset
    component rst_btn type "Tactile_Switch" {
        value "Reset_Button"
        footprint "SW_TACT_SMD_4PIN" # Common SMD tactile switch
        pin "1" 1
        pin "2" 2
        pin "3" 3
        pin "4" 4
    }

    # ATmega328P L-LED (Pin 13)
    component r_l_led type "Resistor" { value "470R" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component l_led type "LED" { value "Red" footprint "SMD-0603" }

    # Nets for ATmega328P
    net "MCU_VCC" { atmega328p.VCC, atmega328p.AVCC, c_mcu_dec1.1, c_mcu_dec2.1, r_reset_pullup.1, r_l_led.1 }
    net "MCU_GND" { atmega328p.GND, c_mcu_dec1.2, c_mcu_dec2.2, c_xtal_mcu1.2, c_xtal_mcu2.2, rst_btn.2, rst_btn.4, l_led.2 }
    net "MCU_RESET" { atmega328p.RESET, r_reset_pullup.2, c_reset_dtr.1, rst_btn.1, rst_btn.3 }
    net "MCU_XTAL1" { atmega328p.XTAL1, xtal_mcu.1, c_xtal_mcu1.1 }
    net "MCU_XTAL2" { atmega328p.XTAL2, xtal_mcu.2, c_xtal_mcu2.1 }
    net "MCU_D13" { atmega328p.PB5/SCK/D13 }

    # Connections for ATmega328P
    connect VCC_5V to MCU_VCC
    connect GND to MCU_GND
    connect MCU_D13 to l_led.1 via r_l_led.2

    #endregion

    #region USB-to-Serial Converter (CH340G)
    component ch340g type "USB_UART" {
        value "CH340G"
        footprint "SSOP-20"
        pin "VCC" 1, 19 # Power input
        pin "GND" 20
        pin "RXI" 3 # Internal RX, typically NC
        pin "TXO" 4 # Internal TX, typically NC
        pin "D-" 15
        pin "D+" 16
        pin "V3" 13 # 3.3V output from internal LDO
        pin "CTS#" 5 # Flow control, typically NC
        pin "DTR#" 6 # Flow control, typically NC
        pin "RTS#" 7 # Flow control, typically NC
        pin "DSR#" 8 # Flow control, typically NC
        pin "RI#" 9 # Flow control, typically NC
        pin "DCD#" 10 # Flow control, typically NC
        pin "RTS" 11 # Used as DTR for Arduino auto-reset
        pin "TXD" 12 # Serial data to MCU RX
        pin "RXD" 14 # Serial data from MCU TX
        pin "XI" 17 # Crystal input
        pin "XO" 18 # Crystal output
    }

    # CH340G Crystal (12MHz) - standard for CH340G
    component xtal_usb type "Crystal" {
        value "12MHz"
        footprint "SMD-3225"
        pin "1" 1
        pin "2" 2
    }
    component c_xtal_usb1 type "Capacitor" { value "22pF" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component c_xtal_usb2 type "Capacitor" { value "22pF" footprint "SMD-0603" }

    # CH340G Decoupling Capacitors
    component c_ch340g_vcc_dec type "Capacitor" { value "0.1uF" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component c_ch340g_v3_out type "Capacitor" { value "0.1uF" footprint "SMD-0603" } # For V3 output

    # CH340G TX/RX Indicator LEDs
    component r_tx_led type "Resistor" { value "470R" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component tx_led type "LED" { value "Yellow" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component r_rx_led type "Resistor" { value "470R" footprint "SMD-0603" }
    component rx_led type "LED" { value "Yellow" footprint "SMD-0603" }

    # Nets for CH340G
    net "CH340G_VCC" { ch340g.VCC_1, ch340g.VCC_19, c_ch340g_vcc_dec.1, r_tx_led.1, r_rx_led.1 }
    net "CH340G_GND" { ch340g.GND, c_ch340g_vcc_dec.2, c_xtal_usb1.2, c_xtal_usb2.2, c_ch340g_v3_out.2, tx_led.2, rx_led.2 }
    net "CH340G_D_MINUS" { ch340g.D- }
    net "CH340G_D_PLUS" { ch340g.D+ }
    net "CH340G_TXD" { ch340g.TXD, atmega328p.PD0/RXD }
    net "CH340G_RXD" { ch340g.RXD, atmega328p.PD1/TXD }
    net "CH340G_V3" { ch340g.V3, c_ch340g_v3_out.1 } # 3.3V output from CH340G
    net "CH340G_XI" { ch340g.XI, xtal_usb.1, c_xtal_usb1.1 }
    net "CH340G_XO" { ch340g.XO, xtal_usb.2, c_xtal_usb2.1 }
    net "CH340G_DTR" { ch340g.RTS } # CH340G RTS pin is used for DTR on Nano

    # Connections for CH340G
    connect VCC_5V to CH340G_VCC
    connect GND to CH340G_GND
    connect usb_conn.D- to CH340G_D_MINUS
    connect usb_conn.D+ to CH340G_D_PLUS
    connect CH340G_TXD to tx_led.1 via r_tx_led.2 # TX LED
    connect CH340G_RXD to rx_led.1 via r_rx_led.2 # RX LED
    connect CH340G_DTR to MCU_RESET via c_reset_dtr.1 # DTR auto-reset connection

    #endregion

    #region Pin Headers (2.54mm pitch, through-hole)
    # Left Header (Digital Pins D0-D13, 3V3)
    component h_left type "Header" {
        value "Digital_Header_Left"
        footprint "HEADER_15X1_2.54MM"
        pin "D0" 1
        pin "D1" 2
        pin "D2" 3
        pin "D3" 4
        pin "D4" 5
        pin "D5" 6
        pin "D6" 7
        pin "D7" 8
        pin "D8" 9
        pin "D9" 10
        pin "D10" 11
        pin "D11" 12
        pin "D12" 13
        pin "D13" 14
        pin "3V3" 15 # 3.3V output, typically from CH340G
    }

    # Right Header (Analog Pins A0-A7, RST, GND, VIN, 5V, AREF)
    component h_right type "Header" {
        value "Analog_Header_Right"
        footprint "HEADER_15X1_2.54MM"
        pin "A0" 1
        pin "A1" 2
        pin "A2" 3
        pin "A3" 4
        pin "A4" 5
        pin "A5" 6
        pin "A6" 7
        pin "A7" 8
        pin "RST" 9
        pin "GND" 10
        pin "VIN" 11
        pin "5V" 12
        pin "RST_ALT" 13 # Duplicate RST pin
        pin "GND_ALT" 14 # Duplicate GND pin
        pin "AREF" 15
    }

    # Connections to Headers
    connect atmega328p.PD0/RXD to h_left.D0
    connect atmega328p.PD1/TXD to h_left.D1
    connect atmega328p.PD2 to h_left.D2
    connect atmega328p.PD3 to h_left.D3
    connect atmega328p.PD4 to h_left.D4
    connect atmega328p.PD5 to h_left.D5
    connect atmega328p.PD6 to h_left.D6
    connect atmega328p.PD7 to h_left.D7
    connect atmega328p.PB0/D8 to h_left.D8
    connect atmega328p.PB1/D9 to h_left.D9
    connect atmega328p.PB2/D10 to h_left.D10
    connect atmega328p.PB3/MOSI/D11 to h_left.D11
    connect atmega328p.PB4/MISO/D12 to h_left.D12
    connect atmega328p.PB5/SCK/D13 to h_left.D13
    connect CH340G_V3 to h_left.3V3 # 3.3V from CH340G

    connect atmega328p.PC0/ADC0 to h_right.A0
    connect atmega328p.PC1/ADC1 to h_right.A1
    connect atmega328p.PC2/ADC2 to h_right.A2
    connect atmega328p.PC3/ADC3 to h_right.A3
    connect atmega328p.PC4/SDA/ADC4 to h_right.A4
    connect atmega328p.PC5/SCL/ADC5 to h_right.A5
    connect atmega328p.PC6/ADC6 to h_right.A6
    connect atmega328p.PC7/ADC7 to h_right.A7
    connect MCU_RESET to h_right.RST
    connect MCU_RESET to h_right.RST_ALT
    connect GND to h_right.GND
    connect GND to h_right.GND_ALT
    connect VIN_REG to h_right.VIN # VIN from external power or USB VBUS via diode
    connect VCC_5V to h_right.5V
    connect atmega328p.AREF to h_right.AREF

    #endregion
}
```
